metadata.description: The name of the existing User Assigned Managed Identity.
The resource group name where the existing UAMI lives.

Role definition GUID to grant at Container App scope.
A (principal object ID, role definition) pair generated for each service principal/user role assignment iteration.

Optional. Array of existing User Assigned Managed Identities (UAMI) to attach to the Container App and grant roles to. Defaults to an empty array.
Optional. Array of object (principal) IDs of existing Microsoft Entra service principals to grant roles to at Container App scope. Defaults to an empty array.
Optional. Array of object IDs of existing Microsoft Entra users to grant roles to at Container App scope. Defaults to an empty array.
Role definition GUIDs assigned to every existing UAMI, service principal, and user at Container App scope.

variables.roleAssignmentName: [if(empty(parameters('roleAssignmentNameSeed')), guid(if(not(empty(parameters('targetStorageAccountName'))), parameters('targetStorageAccountName'), if(not(empty(parameters('targetAccountName'))), parameters('targetAccountName'), if(not(empty(parameters('targetRegistryName'))), parameters('targetRegistryName'), parameters('targetContainerAppName')))), parameters('principalId'), parameters('roleDefinitionId')), parameters('roleAssignmentNameSeed'))]

metadata.description: The resource ID of the role assignment

id.value: [coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(if(variables('useStorageTarget'), extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', if(not(empty(parameters('targetStorageAccountName'))), parameters('targetStorageAccountName'), 'placeholder')), 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', variables('roleAssignmentName')), null()), if(variables('useAccountTarget'), extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts', if(not(empty(parameters('targetAccountName'))), parameters('targetAccountName'), 'placeholder')), 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', variables('roleAssignmentName')), null())), if(variables('useRegistryTarget'), extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries', if(not(empty(parameters('targetRegistryName'))), parameters('targetRegistryName'), 'placeholder')), 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', variables('roleAssignmentName')), null())), if(variables('useContainerAppTarget'), extensionResourceId(resourceId('Microsoft.App/containerApps', if(not(empty(parameters('targetContainerAppName'))), parameters('targetContainerAppName'), 'placeholder')), 'Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments', variables('roleAssignmentName')), null())), '')]

metadata.description: The name of the role assignment

name.value: [coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(coalesce(if(variables('useStorageTarget'), variables('roleAssignmentName'), null()), if(variables('useAccountTarget'), variables('roleAssignmentName'), null())), if(variables('useRegistryTarget'), variables('roleAssignmentName'), null())), if(variables('useContainerAppTarget'), variables('roleAssignmentName'), null())), variables('roleAssignmentName'))]

variables.identityConfig: [if(and(variables('hasUserAssignedIdentities'), parameters('enableSystemAssignedIdentity')), createObject('type', 'SystemAssigned,UserAssigned', 'userAssignedIdentities', reduce(parameters('userAssignedIdentityResourceIds'), createObject(), lambda('acc', 'id', union(lambdaVariables('acc'), createObject(format('{0}', lambdaVariables('id')), createObject()))))), if(variables('hasUserAssignedIdentities'), createObject('type', 'UserAssigned', 'userAssignedIdentities', reduce(parameters('userAssignedIdentityResourceIds'), createObject(), lambda('acc', 'id', union(lambdaVariables('acc'), createObject(format('{0}', lambdaVariables('id')), createObject()))))), if(parameters('enableSystemAssignedIdentity'), createObject('type', 'SystemAssigned'), createObject('type', 'None'))))]
